of good quality (Jupiter). The native will have uterine troubles after marriage,
and after 32-35 her husband will be happily placed. At her 37th year good luck
will dawn. She will have 2 sons and 2 daughters and live happily.
CHART 481
The native's father will be a trader and flouri~h thereby (Mercury Venus
in the 2nd to Sun). The native will be devotional and als'o helpful in his nature.
He will also live by doing some business.
The disciple questioned-"Gutuji ... !In another chart having the Moon
and Ketu in consecutive houses to Saturn you predicted a medical profession

IMPORTANT CHARTS 315
to the native. But here you say the
native will be a trader...How is this?" Sat. Moon Dt.
The Guruji replied-In both
Sun
these charts there is exchange of places Jupt.
Mars
between Jupiter and Saturn and Venus
is placed in Cancer in the other chart. Mer.
Ven.
Venus-Moon gave art, and profession
was judged by his association with
